title: Authors and Citation
text: Maximilian Mücke. Author, maintainer.

title: Authors and Citation
text: Mücke M (2026). gleifr: Client 'GLEIF' API. R package version 0.2.0.9000, https://m-muecke.github.io/gleifr/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {gleifr: Client for the 'GLEIF' API},   author = {Maximilian Mücke},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.2.0.9000},   url = {https://m-muecke.github.io/gleifr/}, }

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: gleifr minimal R client GLEIF API. major challenge dealing financial data mapping entities across different data sources. Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) 20-character, alphanumeric code uniquely identifies legally distinct entities engage financial transactions. Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation (GLEIF) maintains global LEI system exposes free, public API. gleifr wraps API can, R: look reference data behind LEI, search LEIs name, jurisdiction, full text, traverse corporate hierarchies via direct ultimate parent child relationships, map LEIs identifiers ISIN, BIC, MIC, access supporting reference data like regions accredited issuers (Local Operating Units).

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: can install development version gleifr GitHub :
code: # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("m-muecke/gleifr")

title: Client for the GLEIF API
code: library(gleifr)

what: Looking up a record by LEI
title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: Pass LEI lei_record_by_id() retrieve full reference data. default result returned tidy long-format data frame one attribute per row:
code: record <- lei_record_by_id("001GPB6A9XPE8XJICC14") str(record) #> 'data.frame':    37 obs. of  3 variables: #>  $ lei  : chr  "001GPB6A9XPE8XJICC14" "001GPB6A9XPE8XJICC14" "001GPB6A9XPE8XJ".. #>  $ name : chr  "entity_legal_name_name" "entity_legal_name_language" "entity_".. #>  $ value: chr  "Fidelity Advisor Leveraged Company Stock Fund" "en" "FIDELITY"..

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: Use lei_records() query LEI database. can filter legal name, country, jurisdiction, status, category, ISIN, run full-text query:
code: # search by legal name lei_records(legal_name = "Deutsche Bank")  # combine filters lei_records(country = "DE", registration_status = "ISSUED")

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: Traverse ownership hierarchies lei_parent() lei_children():
code: # direct parent (use type = "ultimate" for the ultimate parent) lei_parent("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336")  # direct children lei_children("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336")

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: lei_mapping() downloads latest bulk relationship file maps every LEI another identifier type: ISIN, BIC, MIC, OpenCorporates ID ("oc"): fetch ISINs single entity instead full file, use lei_isins():
code: mapping <- lei_mapping("isin") head(mapping) #>                    lei         isin #> 1 00EHHQ2ZHDCFXJCPCL46 US92204Q1031 #> 2 00KLB2PFTM3060S2N216 US4138382027 #> 3 029200038B4L4ZI1E579 NGSDCBANCO00 #> 4 029200067A7K6CH0H586 NGSDCSCSPLC2 #> 5 0292001178F3RHI5D836 NGNEIMETH001 #> 6 0292001178F3RHI5D836 NGRR26NEIME9 lei_isins("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336")

title: Client for the GLEIF API
text: API responses can cached locally avoid repeated downloads. Caching opt-controlled options:
code: # enable caching (responses are kept for 1 day by default) options(gleifr.cache = TRUE)  # customize the maximum age in seconds options(gleifr.cache_max_age = 3600)  # inspect or clear the cache lei_cache_dir() lei_cache_clear()

what: Get or manage the gleifr API cache — cache
title: Get or manage the gleifr API cache — cache
text: lei_cache_dir() returns path cached API responses stored. lei_cache_clear() clears cached responses.

title: Get or manage the gleifr API cache — cache
code: lei_cache_dir()  lei_cache_clear()

title: Get or manage the gleifr API cache — cache
text: lei_cache_dir() returns string path cache directory. lei_cache_clear() called side effect clearing cached responses returns NULL invisibly.

title: Get or manage the gleifr API cache — cache
text: cache used enabled options(gleifr.cache = TRUE). Cached responses stored 1 day default, can customized options(gleifr.cache_max_age = seconds).

title: Get or manage the gleifr API cache — cache
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # enable caching options(gleifr.cache = TRUE)  # view cache location lei_cache_dir()  # clear the cache lei_cache_clear() } # }

what: gleifr: Client for the 'GLEIF' API — gleifr-package
title: gleifr: Client for the 'GLEIF' API — gleifr-package
text: Download legal entity reference data 'Global Legal Entity Identifier Foundation' ('GLEIF') API. Retrieve Legal Entity Identifier ('LEI') records, direct ultimate parent child relationships, accredited issuers ('Local Operating Units'), mappings 'LEI' codes identifiers 'ISIN', 'BIC', 'MIC'. See https://www.gleif.org/en/lei-data/gleif-api details.

title: gleifr: Client for the 'GLEIF' API — gleifr-package
text: Maintainer: Maximilian Mücke muecke.maximilian@gmail.com (ORCID) Authors: Maximilian Mücke muecke.maximilian@gmail.com (ORCID)

title: Autocomplete LEI records — lei_autocomplete
text: Performs prefix-based completion GLEIF API, returning candidate values together LEI. Useful typeahead-style lookups. typo-tolerant matching, see lei_fuzzy().

title: Autocomplete LEI records — lei_autocomplete
code: lei_autocomplete(q, field = c("fulltext", "owns", "ownedBy"))

title: Autocomplete LEI records — lei_autocomplete
text: https://www.gleif.org/en/lei-data/gleif-api

title: Autocomplete LEI records — lei_autocomplete
text: q (character(1)) search query. field (character(1)) field search. One "fulltext", "owns", "ownedBy". Default "fulltext".

title: Autocomplete LEI records — lei_autocomplete
text: data.frame() columns: value: matched value lei: Legal Entity Identifier matched record, NA none linked nothing matches, NULL.

title: Autocomplete LEI records — lei_autocomplete
code: # \donttest{ lei_autocomplete("Appl") #>        value                  lei #> 1   AppLogic 724500S2JQ8M9Q67N911 #> 2   AT APPLI 254900RKVKGKPHAN8C29 #> 3   APPLE 12 969500RDBEVTUKOLE690 #> 4   APPLISOL 969500QR5XNTB9QQIQ09 #> 5   APPLITEC                 <NA> #> 6   APPLY AS 636700DQ0JLHIXYKLG19 #> 7  Apple Ltd 529900RYTCJRAG2BSI79 #> 8  BIG APPLE 9845002756D91F74C846 #> 9  APPLE INN 64886E905REV38LP9S76 #> 10 APPLE-WAY 969500QV2N8IIVULLH93 # }

title: Fetch LEI child records — lei_children
text: Fetches direct ultimate child records given LEI.

title: Fetch LEI child records — lei_children
code: lei_children(id, type = c("direct", "ultimate"), limit = 200L, simplify = TRUE)

title: Fetch LEI child records — lei_children
text: id (character(1)) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) fetch children . type (character(1)) type children fetch. One "direct" "ultimate". Default "direct". limit (NULL | integer(1)) Maximum number records return. Default 200L. Use NULL fetch . simplify (logical(1)) output simplified? Default TRUE.

title: Fetch LEI child records — lei_children
text: simplify = TRUE, long-format data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier name: attribute name value: attribute value simplify = FALSE, named list() containing raw API response. simplify = TRUE records match, NULL.

title: Fetch LEI child records — lei_children
code: # \donttest{ # get direct children head(lei_children("O2RNE8IBXP4R0TD8PU41", limit = 5)) #>                    lei                          name #> 1 984500EAE6D72CBA2C07        entity_legal_name_name #> 2 984500EAE6D72CBA2C07    entity_legal_name_language #> 3 984500EAE6D72CBA2C07       entity_other_names_name #> 4 984500EAE6D72CBA2C07   entity_other_names_language #> 5 984500EAE6D72CBA2C07       entity_other_names_type #> 6 984500EAE6D72CBA2C07 entity_legal_address_language #>                             value #> 1                   АЛД Аутомотив #> 2                              bg #> 3                  ALD Automotive #> 4                              en #> 5 ALTERNATIVE_LANGUAGE_LEGAL_NAME #> 6                              bg  # get ultimate children head(lei_children("O2RNE8IBXP4R0TD8PU41", type = "ultimate", limit = 5)) #>                    lei                               name #> 1 391200JA6V2BZOH3JO02             entity_legal_name_name #> 2 391200JA6V2BZOH3JO02         entity_legal_name_language #> 3 391200JA6V2BZOH3JO02      entity_legal_address_language #> 4 391200JA6V2BZOH3JO02 entity_legal_address_address_lines #> 5 391200JA6V2BZOH3JO02          entity_legal_address_city #> 6 391200JA6V2BZOH3JO02        entity_legal_address_region #>                            value #> 1 SG Frankfurt Beteiligungs GmbH #> 2                             de #> 3                             de #> 4      Neue Mainzer Straße 46-50 #> 5                      Frankfurt #> 6                          DE-HE # }

code: lei_countries()

code: # \donttest{ head(lei_countries()) #>   code                       name #> 1   AD                    Andorra #> 2   AE United Arab Emirates (the) #> 3   AF                Afghanistan #> 4   AG        Antigua and Barbuda #> 5   AI                   Anguilla #> 6   AL                    Albania # }

what: Fuzzy search for LEI records — lei_fuzzy
title: Fuzzy search for LEI records — lei_fuzzy
text: Performs typo-tolerant, approximate search GLEIF API. Unlike filters lei_records(), match literal substrings, matches edit distance returns candidate values together LEI. Useful resolving messy misspelled entity names LEI, can passed lei_record_by_id().

title: Fuzzy search for LEI records — lei_fuzzy
code: lei_fuzzy(q, field = c("fulltext", "entity.legalName", "owns", "ownedBy"))

title: Fuzzy search for LEI records — lei_fuzzy
text: https://www.gleif.org/en/lei-data/gleif-api

title: Fuzzy search for LEI records — lei_fuzzy
text: q (character(1)) search query. field (character(1)) field search. One "fulltext", "entity.legalName", "owns", "ownedBy". Default "fulltext".

title: Fuzzy search for LEI records — lei_fuzzy
text: data.frame() columns: value: matched value lei: Legal Entity Identifier matched record, NA none linked nothing matches, NULL.

title: Fuzzy search for LEI records — lei_fuzzy
code: # \donttest{ lei_fuzzy("Deutsch Bank", field = "entity.legalName") #>                         value                  lei #> 1            DEUTSCHE BANK SA 529900J2KCFIPEYJIE34 #> 2        DEUTSCHE BANK S.P.A. 529900SS7ZWCX82U3W60 #> 3      Deutsche Bank Stiftung 391200PCHLV827FDCB76 #> 4   Deutsche Bank (Chile) S.A 549300B4Z1JOQPQSVA53 #> 5   Deutsche Bank Europe GmbH 213800QILIUD4ROSUO03 #> 6   Deutsche Bank (Perú) S.A. 529900N94W687OHXIV81 #> 7   DEUTSCHE BANK SA ESPAÑOLA 529900SICIK5OVMVY186 #> 8   Deutsche Bank (Suisse) SA 529900BXKPMXQTRE1V05 #> 9  Deutsche Bank (Chile) S.A. 529900S441FVQLZIRQ90 #> 10 DEUTSCHE BANK MUTUI S.P.A. 8156006ACD5E92B0C985 # }

what: Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins
title: Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins

code: lei_isins(id, limit = 200L)

title: Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins
text: id (character(1)) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) fetch ISINs . limit (NULL | integer(1)) Maximum number records return. Default 200L. Use NULL fetch .

title: Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins
text: data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier isin: ISIN LEI ISINs, NULL.

title: Fetch ISINs for a LEI — lei_isins
code: # \donttest{ head(lei_isins("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336", limit = 10)) #>                    lei         isin #> 1 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000CJ54RR7 #> 2 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000CL9DFV2 #> 3 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000CL7M7B9 #> 4 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000CL2K8H1 #> 5 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000CU4VEV7 #> 6 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 DE000CL9A609 # }

what: Fetch the list of entity legal forms — lei_legal_forms
title: Fetch the list of entity legal forms — lei_legal_forms
text: Fetches list entity legal forms (ELF codes) recognized GLEIF API. resolve legal form codes appear lei_record_by_id() output human-readable names.

code: lei_legal_forms()

title: Fetch the list of entity legal forms — lei_legal_forms
text: data.frame() columns: code: entity legal form (ELF) code country: country legal form applies country_code: country code status: status legal form, e.g. "ACTV" name: local name legal form language: language name

what: Fetch the change history of a LEI record — lei_modifications
title: Fetch the change history of a LEI record — lei_modifications
text: Fetches field-level modification history given LEI, .e. audit log every recorded change entity (recordType "LEI") relationships (recordType "RR").

title: Fetch the change history of a LEI record — lei_modifications
code: lei_modifications(id, limit = 200L)

title: Fetch the change history of a LEI record — lei_modifications
text: https://www.gleif.org/en/lei-data/gleif-api

title: Fetch the change history of a LEI record — lei_modifications
text: id (character(1)) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) fetch change history . limit (NULL | integer(1)) Maximum number records return. Default 200L. Use NULL fetch .

title: Fetch the change history of a LEI record — lei_modifications
text: data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier record_type: record change applies , "LEI" "RR" modification_type: type change, e.g. "UPDATE" field: path changed field date: date change value_old: previous value, NA none value_new: new value, NA none LEI modifications, NULL.

title: Fetch the change history of a LEI record — lei_modifications

           UPDATE #> 6 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336          RR            UPDATE #>                                                                                                                                         field #> 1                                        /rr:RelationshipData/rr:RelationshipRecords/rr:RelationshipRecord/rr:Registration/rr:NextRenewalDate #> 2 /rr:RelationshipData/rr:RelationshipRecords/rr:RelationshipRecord/rr:Registration/rr:LastUpdateDate #> 4                                         /rr:RelationshipData/rr:RelationshipRecords/rr:RelationshipRecord/rr:Registration/rr:LastUpdateDate #> 5 /rr:RelationshipData/rr:RelationshipRecords/rr:RelationshipRecord/rr:Relationship/rr:RelationshipPeriods/rr:RelationshipPeriod/rr:StartDate #> 6 /rr:RelationshipData/rr:RelationshipRecords/rr:RelationshipRecord/rr:Relationship/rr:RelationshipPeriods/rr:RelationshipPeriod/rr:StartDate #>                   date                 value_old                 value_new #> 1 2025-08-28T00:00:00Z 2025-10-18T00:00:00+02:00 2026-10-18T00:00:00+02:00 #> 2 2025-08-28T00:00:00Z 2025-10-18T00:00:00+02:00 2026-10-18T00:00:00+02:00 #> 3 2025-08-28T00:00:00Z 2024-10-17T14:39:14+02:00 2025-08-27T16:35:08+02:00 #> 4 2025-08-28T00:00:00Z 2024-10-17T14:39:14+02:00 2025-08-27T16:35:08+02:00 #> 5 2025-08-28T00:00:00Z 2024-03-11T00:00:00+01:00 2025-03-12T00:00:00+01:00 #> 6 2025-08-28T00:00:00Z 2024-03-11T00:00:00+01:00 2025-03-12T00:00:00+01:00 # }

title: Fetch a LEI record — lei_record_by_id
text: Fetch single LEI record Legal Entity Identifier. fetch records attribute filters, see lei_records().

title: Fetch a LEI record — lei_record_by_id
code: lei_record_by_id(id, simplify = TRUE)

title: Fetch a LEI record — lei_record_by_id
text: id (character(1)) Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) fetch. simplify (logical(1)) output simplified? Default TRUE.

title: Fetch a LEI record — lei_record_by_id
text: simplify = TRUE, long-format data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier name: attribute name value: attribute value simplify = FALSE, named list() containing raw API response.

title: Fetch a LEI record — lei_record_by_id
code: # \donttest{ # get simplified long-format data.frame head(lei_record_by_id("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336")) #>                    lei                                       name #> 1 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336                     entity_legal_name_name #> 2 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336                 entity_legal_name_language #> 3 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336     entity_transliterated_other_names_name #> 4 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336 entity_transliterated_other_names_language #> 5 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336     entity_transliterated_other_names_type #> 6 529900W18LQJJN6SJ336              entity_legal_address_language #>                                  value #> 1       Société Générale Effekten GmbH #> 2                                   fr #> 3       Societe Generale Effekten GmbH #> 4                                   fr #> 5 AUTO_ASCII_TRANSLITERATED_LEGAL_NAME #> 6                                   de  # get raw API response as named list str(lei_record_by_id("529900W18LQJJN6SJ336", simplify = FALSE), max.level = 2) #> List of 2 #>  $ meta:List of 1 #>   ..$ goldenCopy:List of 1 #>  $ data:List of 5 #>   ..$ type         : chr "lei-records" #>   ..$ id           : chr "529900W18LQJJN6SJ336" #>   ..$ attributes   :List of 10 #>   ..$ relationships:List of 7 #>   ..$ links        :List of 1 # }

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
text: Fetch LEI records GLEIF database, optionally filtered attribute. filters combined logical , one supply narrows results . fetch single record LEI, see lei_record_by_id().

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
code: lei_records(   legal_name = NULL,   fulltext = NULL,   country = NULL,   jurisdiction = NULL,   registration_status = NULL,   entity_status = NULL,   category = NULL,   isin = NULL,   ...,   limit = 200L,   simplify = TRUE )

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
text: legal_name (NULL | character(1)) Filter legal name. fulltext (NULL | character(1)) Full-text search query. country (NULL | character(1)) Filter legal address country (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code), e.g. "DE". jurisdiction (NULL | character(1)) Filter jurisdiction (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code), e.g. "DE". registration_status (NULL | character(1)) Filter LEI registration status, e.g. "ISSUED" "LAPSED". entity_status (NULL | character(1)) Filter entity status, one "ACTIVE" "INACTIVE". category (NULL | character(1)) Filter entity category, e.g. "FUND", "BRANCH", "GENERAL". isin (NULL | character(1)) Filter ISIN. ... Additional filter parameters passed GLEIF API. appended query parameters, e.g. "filter[entity.subCategory]" = "CENTRAL_GOVERNMENT". limit (NULL | integer(1)) Maximum number records return. Default 200L. Use NULL fetch matching records. simplify (logical(1)) output simplified? Default TRUE.

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
text: simplify = TRUE, long-format data.frame() columns: lei: Legal Entity Identifier name: attribute name value: attribute value simplify = FALSE, list() raw record objects API. simplify = TRUE records match, NULL.

title: Fetch LEI records — lei_records
code: # \donttest{ # search by legal name head(lei_records(legal_name = "Deutsche Bank", limit = 5)) #>                    lei                               name #> 1 2138002P57WJTH4PBX56             entity_legal_name_name #> 2 2138002P57WJTH4PBX56         entity_legal_name_language #> 3 2138002P57WJTH4PBX56      entity_legal_address_language #> 4 2138002P57WJTH4PBX56 entity_legal_address_address_lines #> 5 2138002P57WJTH4PBX56          entity_legal_address_city #> 6 2138002P57WJTH4PBX56        entity_legal_address_region #>                                                                   value #> 1 STICHTING ACHMEA ALGEMEEN PENSIOENFONDS KRING DEUTSCHE BANK NEDERLAND #> 2                                                                    nl #> 3                                                                    en #> 4                                                          HANDELSWEG 2 #> 5                                                                 ZEIST #> 6                                                                 NL-ZH  # filter by country and registration status head(lei_records(country = "DE", registration_status = "ISSUED", limit = 5)) #>                    lei                               name #> 1 05NYH65HUDFHD5XPKR75             entity_legal_name_name #> 2 05NYH65HUDFHD5XPKR75         entity_legal_name_language #> 3 05NYH65HUDFHD5XPKR75      entity_legal_address_language #> 4 05NYH65HUDFHD5XPKR75 entity_legal_address_address_lines #> 5 05NYH65HUDFHD5XPKR75          entity_legal_address_city #> 6 05NYH65HUDFHD5XPKR75        entity_legal_address_region #>                       value #> 1 Raytheon Deutschland GmbH #> 2                        de #> 3                        de #> 4            Kulturstr. 105 #> 5                  Freising #> 6                     DE-BY # }

what: Fetch the list of registration authorities — lei_registration_authorities
title: Fetch the list of registration authorities — lei_registration_authorities
text: Fetches list registration authorities (RA codes) recognized GLEIF API. resolve registration authority codes appear lei_record_by_id() output issuing business registries.

title: Fetch the list of registration authorities — lei_registration_authorities
code: lei_registration_authorities()

title: Fetch the list of registration authorities — lei_registration_authorities
text: data.frame() columns: code: registration authority (RA) code international_name: international name authority local_name: local name authority, NA none website: authority website, NA none

title: Fetch the list of registration authorities — lei_registration_authorities
code: # \donttest{ head(lei_registration_authorities()) #> iterating ■■■■■■■■■■■                       33% | ETA:  2s #> iterating ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■  100% | ETA:  0s #>       code #> 1 RA000001 #> 2 RA000002 #> 3 RA000003 #> 4 RA000004 #> 5 RA000005 #> 6 RA000006 #>                                                            international_name #> 1 Afghanistan Central Business Registry (Ministry of Commerce and Industries) #> 2                                                                        <NA> #> 3                                                              Trade Register #> 4                                                        Register of Commerce #> 5                                          Central Registry of Business Names #> 6                                                         Commercial Registry #>                                 local_name #> 1                                     <NA> #> 2                                     <NA> #> 3                     Registre du Commerce #> 4         Registre de Societats Mercantils #> 5 Ficheiro Central de Denominações Sociais #> 6                      Commercial Registry #>                                                     website #> 1                                   http://www.acbr.gov.af/ #> 2                               http://www.qkr.gov.al/home/ #> 3                https://sidjilcom.cnrc.dz/web/cnrc/accueil #> 4                     http://www.comerc.ad/la-unitat-comerc #> 5 http://www.cidadao.gov.ao/VerPrestadorServico.aspx?id=233 #> 6                         http://www.commercialregistry.ai/ # }

title: gleifr 0.2.0
text: Fixed pagination truncating results 200 records. Empty results now consistently return NULL instead malformed list. limit 200 longer fetches 200 records. Replaced rvest dependency lighter xml2.

title: gleifr 0.1.0
text: CRAN release: 2026-06-20 Initial CRAN submission.
